overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a snow-covered Japanese village at night. The character ascends a path to an overlook with views of the village, mountains, and full moon, then descends toward a stream.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered village street with traditional wooden buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the village street, passing traditional wooden buildings with glowing lanterns

notable_agents.action: villagers standing near a wooden cart loaded with goods

entered.detail: traditional Japanese building with snow-covered thatched roof and hanging fabric banner
warm glowing paper lanterns hanging from building eaves
snow-capped mountains visible in the distance against dark sky
wooden cart loaded with goods parked near villagers

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a snow-covered village street at night, passing traditional wooden buildings illuminated by warm paper lanterns. Villagers stand near a wooden cart on the left as the character moves forward along the path, with snow-capped mountains visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain path with stone stairs

events.description: character begins ascending stone stairs leading up the mountainside

agents.ego_description: climbing snow-covered stone stairs leading up from the village toward higher ground

entered.detail: stone stairs covered with snow leading upward through the village
large boulders covered in snow lining the path
multi-story traditional wooden building with lit windows visible up the path

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a snow-covered stone stairway leading up from the village street. Large snow-covered boulders line the path, and a large traditional wooden building with illuminated windows becomes visible higher up the slope as the character climbs.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain overlook with panoramic village views

events.description: full moon becomes visible in the sky, illuminating the landscape with silver light
character stops walking and pans camera to survey the panoramic view of the village and mountains

agents.ego_description: reaching the overlook and pausing to survey the panoramic view of the snowy village, mountains, and full moon

entered.detail: wooden bridge spanning across the stream in the valley below
bright full moon visible in the clear night sky
panoramic view of the snow-covered village with scattered lights in the valley
narrow stream flowing through the snowy valley reflecting moonlight

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a wide overlook with panoramic views of the snow-covered village nestled in the valley. The full moon becomes visible in the clear night sky, casting silver light over the landscape. A wooden bridge spans a stream below, while distant mountains frame the horizon. The character pauses to survey the scenic vista.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep snowy slope leading down to stream

events.description: character begins descending the snowy slope toward the stream below

agents.ego_description: carefully descending the steep snow-covered slope toward the stream, with the village and mountains visible in the background

entered.detail: simple wooden fence posts along the edge of the path

segments.scene_description: The character descends a steep snow-covered slope toward the stream, with wooden fence posts visible on the right. The village lights and wooden bridge remain visible in the valley below, while the character carefully navigates the descent with the mountain panorama still visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins in the intimate warmth of a snowy village and ascends to a sweeping lunar vista before descending back toward the valley. It begins by following the character through a village street lined with traditional wooden buildings and glowing paper lanterns, with snow-capped mountains looming in the distance. As the character leaves the street, the camera climbs a snow-covered stone stairway flanked by massive boulders, moving upward toward a large illuminated building on the slope. The scene then opens into a wide panoramic overlook where a full moon casts silver light over the valley, revealing a wooden bridge spanning a stream below. Finally, the camera follows the character as they descend a steep, snowy slope past wooden fence posts, returning toward the stream while the village lights and mountain horizon remain visible in the background.
